description_long: This object consists of two thick, stacked hardcover books bound together by a wide, dark strap running across their width. The covers are a deep, matte black with subtle signs of wear and aging, giving them a slightly distressed appearance. The spines are plain and unadorned, matching the covers in color and texture, and the edges of the pages are a muted, brownish-tan, suggesting aged or high-quality paper. The strap appears to be made of a similar dark material, possibly leather or heavy fabric, and is tightly wrapped around both books, holding them securely together. There are no visible illustrations, text, or decorative elements on the covers or spines. The overall look is utilitarian and understated, with a focus on durability and function rather than ornamentation.
description: A pair of thick, black hardcover books bound together by a wide, dark strap, with plain covers and aged page edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the exposed, brownish page edges of both books and the plain, dark covers.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the wide, dark strap running vertically across the stacked books, with the spines visible but unmarked.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the page edges and the plain, dark covers without any visible markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the strap running vertically, showing the page edges and the plain, dark spines.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain black with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements. The design is simple and unembellished.
